message:
feat(console): Add IndeterminateSpinner for unknown-length operations

Implements a spinner renderable for operations with unknown duration:
- SpinnerStyle enum: Dots, Braille, Line, Arrow, Simple
- Configurable frame animation with style-specific intervals
- Elapsed time tracking and display
- Conversion to OperationProgress when total becomes known
- Plain text, styled (ANSI), and JSON output modes

Also fixes pre-existing clippy needless_return warnings in console.rs.

Includes 20 unit tests covering all functionality.

Closes: bd-2zf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
